lud16.label: Lightning Address

picture.description: Upload an image or provide a URL

toast.bannerUploadFailed: Failed to upload banner. Please try again.
toast.notLoggedIn: You must be logged in to update your profile
toast.pictureUploadFailed: Failed to upload profile picture. Please try again.
toast.updateFailed: Failed to update your profile. Please try again.

website.description: Your personal website or social link
website.label: Website

imageCrop.hint: Drag to reposition · Pinch or scroll to zoom
imageCrop.title: Crop Image

muteRecovery.description: Browse and restore previous versions of your mute list.
muteRecovery.empty: No mute list history found. Your relay may not store historical events.
muteRecovery.restoreFailedDescription: Could not republish the mute list. Please try again.
muteRecovery.title: Mute List Recovery

paymentTargets.description: Let supporters send you crypto and tips.

invalidAddress.description: "{{authority}}" doesn't look like a valid {{method}} address.
invalidAddress.descriptionHandle: "{{authority}}" doesn't look like a valid {{method}} address/handle.
invalidAddress.title: Invalid {{method}} address

paymentTargets.title: Accept Donations

advanced.corsProxyDescription: Proxy for cross-origin requests (NIP-05 fallback). Use {href} as a placeholder for the target URL.
advanced.currencyDisplayDescription: Choose how zap totals, balances, and other monetary amounts are shown throughout the app. USD is converted from sats using the current BTC price; sats falls back automatically when the price is unavailable.
advanced.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your data from the network, including your profile, posts, reactions, and direct messages. This action is irreversible.
advanced.faviconUrlDescription: URI template for fetching site favicons. Supports RFC 6570 variables: {href}, {hostname}, {origin}, etc.
advanced.introDescription: Wallet connections, system configuration, and other advanced options.
advanced.linkPreviewUrlDescription: URI template for fetching link previews (returns OEmbed JSON). Supports RFC 6570 variables: {url}, {hostname}, {origin}, etc.
advanced.metaDescription: Advanced settings for wallet, system, and power user configuration
advanced.sentryDsnDescription: Sentry Data Source Name (DSN) for error reporting. Leave empty to disable Sentry.
advanced.shareErrorReportsDescription: Help improve this app by automatically sending crash and error reports.
advanced.statsPubkeyDescription: Trusted pubkey for pre-computed engagement stats (likes, reposts, comments).
advanced.statsPubkeyError: Pubkey must be exactly 64 hexadecimal characters
advanced.statsSourceUpdatedDescription: Using NIP-85 stats from this pubkey.
advanced.subtitle: Wallet connections, system configuration, and other advanced options for power users.
advanced.title: Advanced

content.autoplayVideosDescription: Automatically play videos (muted) in feeds and previews
content.contentControlDescription: You decide what shows up in your feeds.
content.exemptFollowsDescription: Muted hashtags and words won't hide posts from accounts you follow. Muted users and threads still apply.
content.pageDescription: Mute users, hashtags, or words, and choose how sensitive content is shown. Mutes are encrypted and private.
content.policyBlurDescription: Hidden behind a warning until you choose to view it.
content.sensitiveDescription: How to display posts their author marked as sensitive (NSFW, spoilers, etc).
content.showCustomThemesDescription: Display other users' custom themes when visiting their profiles

feed.appFeedDescription: Show trending and curated content from the {{appName}} relay
feed.communityDescription: Set a community domain. We'll download the NIP-05 user list to show posts only from verified members.
feed.communityFeedInactive: Set a community below to enable this feed
feed.feedNavigationDescription: Choose which tabs appear at the top of your home feed.
feed.globalFeedDescription: Show posts from all users across the network
feed.homepageDescription: Choose which page to display when you open the app
feed.interestTabsDescription: Hashtags and locations you follow appear as tabs on the home feed.
feed.noCustomTabs: No custom tabs yet. Save a search from the search page, or add one above.
feed.otherStuffDescription: Nostr isn't just text posts — pick what else shows up in your home feed.
feed.pageDescription: Nostr supports many content types beyond text posts. Customize which appear in your home feed.
feed.postTypesDescription: Core content types that appear in your home feed.
feed.showRepliesDescription: Include replies from people you follow, not just top-level posts

settings.intro: Shape your identity, tune your feed, and manage how you connect to the Nostr network.
settings.introSub: Everything you need to make this place feel like yours.

magic.introDescription: Harness the mystical energies of your device. Imbue your cursor with elemental fire and make every interaction feel enchanted.
magic.magicMouseDescription: Your cursor (or finger on touch devices) will emanate magical fire in the glow of your primary color. Move with purpose — every path you trace becomes a trail of flame.
magic.metaDescription: Magical cursor effects and enchanted interface settings
magic.subtitle: Harness the mystical energies of your device. Imbue your cursor with elemental fire.
magic.title: Magic

settings.magicUnlockedDescription: You have awakened the arcane. Your cursor now burns with enchanted fire.

network.appBlossomDescription: Default file upload servers for reliable media hosting. Used alongside your personal servers when enabled.
network.appBlossomDisabledDescription: Only your personal Blossom servers will be used.
network.appBlossomEnabledDescription: App Blossom servers will be used alongside your personal servers.
network.appRelaysDescription: Default relays for reliable connectivity. Used alongside your personal relays when enabled.
network.appRelaysDisabledDescription: Only your personal relays will be used.
network.appRelaysEnabledDescription: App relays will be used alongside your personal relays.
network.blossomListPublishFailed: Failed to publish Blossom server list
network.blossomListPublishFailedDescription: There was an error publishing your server list to Nostr.
network.blossomListPublishedDescription: Your Blossom server list has been published to Nostr.
network.invalidRelayUrlDescription: Please enter a valid relay URL (e.g., wss://relay.example.com)
network.invalidServerUrlDescription: Please enter a valid HTTPS URL (e.g., https://blossom.example.com/)
network.loginToSync: Log in to sync your relay list with Nostr
network.loginToSyncBlossom: Log in to sync your Blossom server list with Nostr
network.metaDescription: Manage relays and file upload servers
network.networkConnectionsDescription: Manage your relay connections. Relays are servers that store and distribute Nostr events across the network.
network.noBlossomServers: No personal Blossom servers configured. Add a server below or enable App Blossom Servers above.
network.noRelays: No personal relays configured. Add relays below.
network.noRelaysWithAppRelays: No personal relays configured. Add relays below or keep App Relays enabled above.
network.pageDescription: Relays are servers that store and distribute content across the Nostr network. Blossom servers handle file uploads.
network.relayExistsDescription: This relay is already in your list.
network.relayListPublishFailedDescription: There was an error publishing your relay list to Nostr.
network.relayListPublishedDescription: Your relay list has been published to Nostr.
network.uploadQualityDescription: Compressed resizes large images and picks the smallest format. Original uploads images exactly as-is.
network.userRelaysDisabledDescription: Your personal relays will not be used. Only app relays will be queried.
network.userRelaysEnabledDescription: Your personal relays will be used alongside app relays when enabled.
network.yourBlossomDescription: Your personal Blossom server list (BUD-03). Synced to Nostr as kind 10063 when logged in.
network.yourRelaysDescription: Your personal relay list. Disabled by default — enable to include your relays in queries and publishes.
network.yourRelaysLogin: Log in to sync your list to Nostr.
network.yourRelaysSynced: Your list is still synced to Nostr when logged in.

notifications.batteryWarning: Battery optimization is enabled for {{appName}}. Android may cut the background relay connection and prevent it from resuming after a reboot.
notifications.blocked: Notifications are blocked. Update your browser settings to allow notifications from this site.
notifications.deliveryMethodDescription: Choose how notifications are delivered to your device.
notifications.enablePushDescription: Receive notifications for activity on your posts
notifications.notSupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.
notifications.onlyFollowingDescription: Hide notifications from accounts you don't follow
notifications.stylePersistentDescription: Keeps a live relay connection open in the background so notifications arrive instantly. Use this for reliable delivery on devices without push notification support.
notifications.stylePushDescription: Standard notifications. No persistent status bar icon.
notifications.subtitle: Customize which notifications you receive.
notifications.title: Notifications

badges.description: When someone awards you a badge
badges.label: Badge Awards

comments.description: When someone comments on or replies to your posts
comments.label: Comments & Replies

letters.description: When someone sends you a letter
letters.label: Letters

mentions.description: When someone mentions you in a note
mentions.label: Mentions

reactions.description: When someone reacts to your posts
reactions.label: Reactions

zaps.description: When someone sends you a lightning or on-chain zap
zaps.label: Zaps

backupKey.bunkerNote: You're signed in with a remote signer (NIP-46). Your secret key is held by that signer and cannot be exported from {{appName}}.
backupKey.copyFailedDescription: Could not access the clipboard. Reveal the key and copy it manually.
backupKey.description: This secret key controls your account on {{appName}}. Anyone with it can post, read your DMs, and impersonate you. Store it in a password manager or somewhere else only you can access.
backupKey.extensionNote: You're signed in with a browser extension (NIP-07). Your secret key is stored there — manage or export it from the extension itself.
backupKey.saveFailedDescription: Could not save the key. Please copy it manually.
backupKey.savedToFileDescription: Your secret key was saved to the Documents folder on your device.
backupKey.title: Your Key
backupKey.warning: NEVER share your secret key with anyone. Avoid screenshotting it or pasting it anywhere except a password manager. If shared, others will be able to access your account.

birthday.description: Shown on your profile — friends get confetti and a birthday tune when they visit on the day. Every field is optional; skip the year if you'd rather keep your age private.
birthday.title: Birthday
birthday.yearError: Enter a 4-digit year between 1900 and {{year}}, or leave it blank.

link.label: Link

music.description: Upload a song or audio clip
music.label: Music
music.placeholder: Upload audio or paste direct file link

photo.label: Photo
photo.placeholder: Upload image or paste direct file link

video.label: Video
video.placeholder: Upload video or paste direct file link

fields.title: Profile Fields
fields.uploadTooltipMedia: Choose a media file to upload

warnings.audioMaybe: This URL may not work as an audio player. For best results, upload a file using the button or paste a direct link to an audio file.
warnings.audioMismatch: This URL doesn’t point to an audio file. Upload an audio file or use a direct link ending in .mp3, .ogg, .wav, etc.
warnings.imageMaybe: This URL may not display as an image. For best results, upload a file using the button or paste a direct link to an image file.
warnings.imageMismatch: This URL doesn’t point to an image. Upload an image or use a direct link ending in .jpg, .png, .webp, etc.
warnings.videoMaybe: This URL may not display as a video. For best results, upload a file using the button or paste a direct link to a video file.
warnings.videoMismatch: This URL doesn’t point to a video. Upload a video or use a direct link ending in .mp4, .webm, .mov, etc.

wallet.activeWalletChangedDescription: The selected wallet is now active for zaps.
wallet.bitcoinApisDescription: Esplora-compatible Bitcoin REST endpoints used by the wallet, on-chain zaps, and tx/address pages. Tried in order — if the top one is rate-limited or down, the next is tried automatically. Reorder so your preferred endpoint is first.
wallet.connectDialogDescription: Paste a connection string from your NWC-compatible wallet.
wallet.connectionUriRequiredDescription: Please enter a valid NWC connection URI.
wallet.installHelp: Install a WebLN browser extension or connect a NWC wallet to send zaps.
wallet.invalidApiUrlDescription: Enter a valid HTTPS URL (e.g. https://mempool.space/api)
wallet.noWalletsDescription: Add an NWC connection to enable instant zaps.
wallet.oneApiRequired: At least one API is required
wallet.oneApiRequiredDescription: Add another endpoint before removing this one, or restore the defaults.
wallet.restoreDefaultsTitle: Restore the default mempool.space → mempool.emzy.de → blockstream.info list
wallet.subtitle: Manage wallet connections and payments
wallet.title: Wallet

sidebar.invalidNsite: Invalid nsite identifier (only named sites are supported)
